lesson_title: Complex Communication and Debate: Vocabulary Lesson 2
learning_objective: Learners can argue, evaluate, clarify and organise detailed communication in a vocabulary task about business.
cefr_outcome: Learners can understand main ideas of complex texts and interact with fluency and spontaneity.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise vocabulary for complex communication and debate. You will learn useful language connected to business and practise mixed conditionals. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at B2 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: mixed conditionals. Vocabulary theme: business. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At B2, learners should argue, evaluate, clarify and organise detailed communication with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use mixed conditionals to talk about business.
Example 2: The learner gives a B2 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for B2.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using mixed conditionals.
options: Correct use of mixed conditionals in a B2 sentence.
Incorrect word order with mixed conditionals.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses mixed conditionals accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of mixed conditionals.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the business phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand business.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand business.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form mixed conditionals. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about business using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: B2 Vocabulary Check - Complex Communication and Debate
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short vocabulary task using mixed conditionals and vocabulary from business.
success_criteria: Uses mixed conditionals with reasonable accuracy
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses mixed conditionals and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to business.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about business. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short B2 response about business. Include the target language: mixed conditionals.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for B2-M01-L02. Speaker one: Today we are practising business. Speaker two: I need to use mixed conditionals correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Mixed Conditionals form
visual_activity_cards.alt_text: Visual grammar card for mixed conditionals
